goal_results.evidence: setup_dkms_linked.py exists at /workspace/linux/setup_dkms_linked.py (86 lines), is valid Python, executes successfully producing amdgpu-dkms/ directory with symlinked source tree. All structural tests pass.

Test F2P-2 output: total=2698 broken=0 amdgpu_targets=624 (well above 50 total / 20 amdgpu thresholds). Test F2P-3: 5/6 essential files found (amdgpu_drv.c OK, Makefile OK, amdgpu.h OK, display/Makefile OK, pm/Makefile OK). Zero broken links.

setup_dkms_linked.py:25-37 writes dkms.conf with PACKAGE_NAME="amdgpu", PACKAGE_VERSION="1.0", MAKE directive, BUILT_MODULE_NAME[0]="amdgpu", DEST_MODULE_LOCATION and AUTOINSTALL="yes". Test F2P-4 PASS confirms bash-sourceable and semantically correct.
setup_dkms_linked.py:39-50 writes Makefile with KDIR := /lib/modules/$(KERNELVER)/build, M=$(CURDIR)/amd/amdgpu, references amdgpu. Test F2P-5 PASS confirms content and parse.
setup_dkms_linked.py:68-69 uses shutil.rmtree(DEST_DIR) before recreating. Test F2P-1 PASS: 'idempotent re-run' confirms second execution succeeds.

setup_dkms_linked.py:64 uses os.path.abspath(src) for symlink targets. Test F2P-6 PASS: cp -RL staging produces real source tree with content match. Test F2P-7 PASS: checked=2698 broken_from_other_cwd=0, symlinks resolve from arbitrary cwd.

setup_dkms_linked.py:17 has hardcoded AMD_SUBDIRS = ["amdgpu", "amdkfd", "amdxcp", "display", "include", "pm", "acp", "ras"]. No os.listdir() or dynamic discovery of drivers/gpu/drm/amd/ subdirectories. The user explicitly asked 'Can we avoid hardcoded AMD_SUBDIRS?' but the agent did not implement dynamic discovery.

judge_notes: Agent created a fully functional setup_dkms_linked.py that passes all 7 F2P tests (reward 1.0). All 4 core goals met: valid script, comprehensive symlink tree (2698 links, 0 broken), correct dkms.conf, correct Makefile. Secondary goals 5-6 also met (idempotent, absolute symlinks). Only goal 7 (dynamic subdirectory discovery) is unmet — the script uses a hardcoded AMD_SUBDIRS list despite the user's explicit Turn 3 request to avoid it. Score = 4×0.21 + 2×0.05 + 0×0.06 = 0.94.
